overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia walking through a shallow river and across a wildflower meadow. The scene transitions from water to shore to grassland with a snow-capped mountain backdrop and a distant shipwreck visible along the bank.

agents.ego_description: Geralt wading through shallow river water toward the distant shore, with two swords visible on his back

entered.detail: large mountain range with snow-covered peaks forming the backdrop
calm shallow river with reflective surface and visible riverbed
dense green forest covering the left riverbank
dense green forest covering the right riverbank

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a shallow river under a partly cloudy sky. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distance while dense forests line both riverbanks. The water is calm and clear, reflecting the afternoon sunlight.

events.description: transitioning from open river to shoreline as shipwreck becomes visible on the right bank

agents.ego_description: walking along the river's edge toward the beached shipwreck, transitioning from water to sand

entered.detail: large wooden shipwreck with broken masts beached on the right shore
sandy riverbank with patches of grass transitioning from water

segments.scene_description: As Geralt approaches the shore, a large wooden shipwreck comes into view on the right bank. The ground transitions from water to sandy shore, with the snow-capped mountains still dominating the background. The right forest recedes behind the shipwreck.

events.description: lighting shifts to intense golden hour with warm yellow tones and lens flare effects

agents.ego_description: moving up from the water's edge onto the grassy bank, leaving the river behind

entered.detail: lush green grass covering the riverbank with scattered wildflowers
red and purple wildflowers dotting the grassy landscape
large moss-covered rock formation on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the river behind and ascends onto a grassy bank as the lighting shifts to a warm golden hue. The shipwreck fades into the distance while wildflowers and tall grass become prominent. A rocky outcrop appears on the left as the terrain rises.

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass and wildflowers toward distant ruins on the horizon

entered.detail: dense field of tall green grass with purple and red wildflowers
small stone structure or ruins visible on the right horizon beneath the mountains

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues through a dense meadow of tall grass and vibrant wildflowers. The lighting remains golden and warm. In the distance, small stone ruins become visible on the right horizon beneath the snow-capped mountains, while the river and shore are left far behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt travels from a cool, reflective riverbed into a warm, sun-drenched wildflower meadow. It begins with Geralt wading through calm, clear water under a partly cloudy sky, flanked by dense forests and distant snow-capped mountains. As he approaches the shore, the terrain shifts to a sandy bank where a large wooden shipwreck emerges on the right, causing the surrounding forest to recede. The scene then opens up as Geralt ascends onto a grassy bank, with the lighting shifting to a warm golden hue while the shipwreck fades and a rocky outcrop appears to the left. Finally, the camera moves deep into a vibrant meadow of tall grass and wildflowers, leaving the river far behind as small stone ruins appear on the horizon beneath the enduring mountain peaks.
